'''halate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulpily|pulpily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulpily|pulpily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| halate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:halate|halate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:halatesher|halatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:halatesherĂ«m|halatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:halatero|halatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:halateshĂ«|halateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:halateshĂ«m|halateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihalatero|gokihalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihalateshĂ«|gokihalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihalateshĂ«m|gokihalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohalankerom|gohalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohalankeshĂ«|gohalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohalankeshĂ«m|gohalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohalankeya|gohalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:halaterom|halaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:halatemu|halatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:halateya|halateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihalaterom|gokihalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihalatemu|gokihalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihalateya|gokihalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:halalate|halalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:halalatesher|halalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:halalatesherĂ«m|halalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:halalatero|halalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:halalateshĂ«|halalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:halalateshĂ«m|halalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihalalatero|gokihalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihalalateshĂ«|gokihalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihalalateshĂ«m|gokihalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohalalankerom|gohalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohalalankeshĂ«|gohalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohalalankeshĂ«m|gohalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohalalankeya|gohalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:halalaterom|halalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:halalatemu|halalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:halalateya|halalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihalalaterom|gokihalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihalalatemu|gokihalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihalalateya|gokihalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠte|hĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠtesher|hĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠtero|hĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠlĂŠtero|gokihĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠterom|hĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠtemu|hĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠlĂŠteya|hĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠlĂŠterom|gokihĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠlĂŠteya|gokihĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:haflafte|haflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:haflaftesher|haflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haflaftesherĂ«m|haflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:haflaftero|haflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:haflafteshĂ«|haflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haflafteshĂ«m|haflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihaflaftero|gokihaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihaflafteshĂ«|gokihaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihaflafteshĂ«m|gokihaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohaflafnkerom|gohaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohaflafnkeshĂ«|gohaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohaflafnkeshĂ«m|gohaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohaflafnkeya|gohaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:haflafterom|haflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:haflaftemu|haflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:haflafteya|haflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihaflafterom|gokihaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihaflaftemu|gokihaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihaflafteya|gokihaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
